refund_policy.summary: Customers may request refunds or returns within 30 days of delivery for most items.
eligibility: Item must be returned within 30 days of delivery date
Product must be unused or defective
Original packaging and accessories should be included when possible
Digital goods and personalized items are non-refundable unless defective
Gold tier members receive free return shipping on eligible items

conditions: Missing accessories may result in partial refund
Visible wear on non-defective returns may incur a restocking fee up to 15%

defective_items.process: Report defect with photos within 90 days. Replacement or full refund offered after verification.
defective_items.shipping: Prepaid return label provided at no cost to the customer

cancelled_orders.after_shipment: Refund issued after return is received and inspected
